nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: White-tailed swallow
nodes.summary: White-tailed swallow（White-tailed swallow，学名 Hirundo megaensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The natural habitat of the white-tailed swallow is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland It is endemic to southern Ethiopia and particularly restricted to the Yabelo–Mega region of Oromia.{{cite journal|author=Mellanby, R.J.|author2= Ross, B.|author3= Watt, A.|author4= Wondafrash, M.|author5= Ewnetu, M.|author6= Broadhurst, C.|author7= Spottiswoode, C

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |year=2008|title= Distribution, abundance and habitat preferences of White-tailed Swallow Hirundo megaensis and Ethiopian Bush-crow Zavattariornis stresemanni, two southern Ethiopian endemics|journal=Bird Conservation International|volume=18|issue= 4|pages= 395–412|doi= 10.1017/S0959270908007314}} It is found between altitudes of ; however, it is not prevalent in altitudes lower than . The white-tailed swallow is most commonly found in both savanna and grassland pastures of high elevation.{{cite journal|author=Spottiswoode, C.N.|author2= Wondafrash, M.|author3= Gabremichael, M

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is one of the most threatened bird species by climate change and a massive range reduction is projected in the future
